subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God on the Day whereon the dwellers of the graves were gathered together from among those who hearkened unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی من آمن بالله فی یوم حشرت فیه اصحاب القبور من الذین سمعوا ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @murder; causing physical harm, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
